focus_points.label: Turning design leadership into org influence
focus_points.reason: Whether he’s getting the right sponsorship and visibility for the strategic work he’s doing, or staying in a safer lane after being passed over last cycle.

focus_points.label: Decision ownership at the next level
focus_points.reason: What “good” looks like for a Lead in Growth & career plan is owning decisions end-to-end—so you can turn his execution into clear accountability and faster unblocking.

focus_points.label: Cross-functional impact and decision leverage
focus_points.reason: What he can point to as measurable cross-functional outcomes—could be fewer last-minute surprises, more shared decisions, or stronger buy-in from product/engineering.

focus_points.label: A concrete growth contract for the next cycle
focus_points.reason: What he wants from this conversation should translate into a specific set of decision and influence commitments, not a generic development list.
